_comment: Catalog of sample regulations for the pipeline. 'folder' is the sub-directory under docs/regulations/ where the PDF(s) live. Bundled samples ship with PDFs; others link to the official source — download the PDF, drop it into the folder (or upload via the UI), then run.

samples.name: DPDP Act 2023
samples.description: India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 + Rules 2025. Bundled in this repo.

samples.name: GDPR (Regulation 2016/679)
samples.description: EU General Data Protection Regulation. Download the official PDF from EUR-Lex.

samples.name: HIPAA Privacy Rule
samples.body: US Dept. of Health & Human Services
samples.description: US health-data privacy rule (45 CFR Part 160 & Part 164). Download from HHS.gov.

samples.name: CCPA
samples.description: California Consumer Privacy Act. Download the text from the CA Attorney General.
